mapper.sql: d.donation_id, d.source, d.kofi_account_id, d.wikisprint_account_id, d.kofi_message_id, a.nick AS account_nick, a.profile_img_url AS account_profile_img_url, d.type, d.supporter_name, d.message, d.amount_cents, d.currency, d.is_anonymous, d.received_at, d.created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO donations ( donation_id, source, kofi_account_id, wikisprint_account_id, kofi_message_id, type, supporter_name, message, amount_cents, currency, is_anonymous, received_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{donationId}, #{source}, #{kofiAccountId}, #{wikisprintAccountId}, #{kofiMessageId}, #{type}, #{supporterName}, #{message}, #{amountCents}, #{currency}, #{isAnonymous}, #{receivedAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM donations d LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = d.wikisprint_account_id ORDER BY d.received_at DESC, d.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM donations d LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = d.wikisprint_account_id ORDER BY d.received_at DESC, d.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM donations d LEFT JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = d.wikisprint_account_id WHERE d.donation_id = #{donationId} LIMIT 1
